message:
fix(test): add CWD guards to workspace discovery tests

Three workspace auto-discovery tests used tempdir-based repo paths but
did not isolate the process CWD.  When parallel tests leave behind
sibling tempdirs containing .bv/workspace.yaml, the ancestor-walk
discovery finds multiple candidates and raises an ambiguity error.

Add CurrentDirGuard::set(root) to each affected test so the CWD
start-point stays inside the test's own directory tree.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
